notes: Wrapper inventory now reflects worker, route, script, capacity, intraday, GAP, and Daily Swing enforcement state.
Older T-002 enforcement-map artifacts are historical and not authoritative for this rollout.

cases.evidence: Direct paper_submit decision and enforcement wrapper remain blocked with can_submit_orders=false.
research_heavy is blocked during REGULAR_MARKET and deny_reason is persisted through blocked_job_status.
research_heavy is allowed during MARKET_CLOSED with HIGH priority and can_submit_orders=false.
Worker wrapper blocks a denied heavy research job before executing its action.
Capacity runner contains decide_with_market_session_policy and RESEARCH_HEAVY gate.
intraday_data_sync maps to JobType.RESEARCH_HEAVY before provider sync work.
Intraday wave execute path contains resource policy gate and blocked_resource_policy manifest decision.
Daily gap dry-run and confirmatory scripts contain resource policy gates before execution.
assert_job_allowed without policy returns resource_policy_missing.
UNKNOWN session returns session_state_unknown.
Entry-ready Daily setup emits non-submitting Lab probe request and artifact flags remain false.
Lab probe policy priority does not bypass paper readiness runner; report remains dry_run_only and submit_allowed=false.
Resource policy and enforcement return blocked paper submit with can_submit_orders=false.
Daily artifact excludes order submission, broker id, live trade, and intraday metric fields.
Resource policy and Daily setup watched routes are GET-only; POST returns 405.
Admin heavy-launch routes contain assert_route_job_allowed guards before scanner, research, backtest, and self-improvement work.
Daily Setup panel contains no button or onClick action.
git ls-files reports no tracked artifacts/runtime paths.
Focal API payload scans find no default password string or raw broker account-id pattern.
Existing intraday registration keeps max_instances=1, coalesce=true, and jitter; no timers or one-shots were modified.

concurrent_worktree_note: Concurrent implementation edits were present during validation; red-team changed only its focal test and this red-team report pair.
scope: secret and raw account-id exposure audit
